detaileddescription.para: Assign the local Vm_ to the incoming Vm from the compartment
Takes over the Process and reinit functions of all derived classes.

briefdescription.para: Specify the Class Info static variable for initialization.

detaileddescription.para: The ChanBase is the base class for all ion channel classes in MOOSE. It knows how to communicate with the parent compartment, not much else.
